title: VMAF tiny-model registry v0
description: Index of trusted ONNX tiny-models shipped with libvmaf. The registry is the *trust root*: every ONNX file referenced here must (1) live under model/tiny/, (2) carry a matching sidecar JSON with the same basename, and (3) match the sha256 digest recorded below. Runtime loaders cross-check the digest before CreateSession; a mismatch refuses to load. Per-model inference metadata (input/output tensor names, normalisation, opset) lives in the sidecar next to each ONNX file — NOT here — so the registry stays small and easy to audit.

schema_version.description: Bumped on breaking changes to registry layout. 0 = pre-release.

kind.description: Mirrors VmafModelKind. 'fr' = full-reference scoring, 'nr' = no-reference scoring, 'filter' = pre-/post-processing residual filter (consumed by ffmpeg vmaf_pre, NOT a scoring model loaded by libvmaf's scoring path).

onnx.description: Path to the ONNX file, relative to model/tiny/.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the exact ONNX bytes shipped in-tree.

opset.description: ONNX opset — mirrors sidecar.onnx_opset. Required for non-smoke models; informational for smoke.

notes.description: Free text; training recipe hash, provenance, etc.

smoke.description: True for the CI smoke fixture. Smoke models are load-path probes, not quality models — they're excluded from the quality-metric harness.

quant_mode.description: Post-training quantisation mode (ADR-0129 / ADR-0173). 'fp32' = ship the .onnx as-is. 'static' / 'dynamic' / 'qat' = the runtime loads `<onnx>.int8.onnx` instead, produced by ai/scripts/ptq_*.py / qat_train.py. The fp32 file stays on disk as the regression baseline.

quant_calibration_set.description: Path to the calibration tensor blob (relative to repo root). Required for `quant_mode: "static"`; ignored for the other modes.

int8_sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256 of the matching `<basename>.int8.onnx` file shipped alongside the fp32 ONNX. Required when `quant_mode != "fp32"`; ignored otherwise. The runtime checks this digest before redirecting to the int8 file (ADR-0174).

quant_accuracy_budget_plcc.description: Maximum allowed Pearson-linear-correlation drop on the per-model VMAF soak fixture, vs the fp32 baseline. The CI ai-quant-accuracy job fails any quantised model that exceeds this budget. Default 0.01 = 1 PLCC point.
